<@443365370271891456> The difficulty of the Star Chapter has been reduced】
The 15-round limit will be lifted for the main investigation of the Star Chapter, so that previously difficult levels can also be completed through emergency gnosis. In addition, the natural trigger damage of Star Arc Counterattack and Poisoning will be increased with the current team's awakening number, up to 200%. Even if the team doesn't have much power-up ability for poisoning and counterattacking, both effects can perform better.

<@694573382380945529> The upper limit of silver key energy in all realms will be raised to coincide with Pure Chaos, and a second special key order can be used each turn. This allows all realms to be more flexible in the planning and use of silver key energy. The unique advantage of "pure chaos" will be adjusted to “the second special key order can be triggered twice”, making its processing of silver key energy more important.
